prompt: I built an Odra Greeter contract (smart-contract/src/greeter.rs) and ran `cargo odra build`. The wasm is at smart-contract/wasm/Greeter.wasm. I have a secp256r1 secret key at secret_key.pem and my node is 65.109.115.124:7777. Walk me through deploying it to Casper Testnet step by step, including all the CLI commands I need.

assertions.name: uses-put-transaction-session
assertions.text: The response uses put-transaction session (not put-deploy)

assertions.name: has-init-param-greeting
assertions.text: The response includes the greeting init param

assertions.name: payment-is-500-cspr
assertions.text: The response uses 500000000000 motes (500 CSPR) for payment

assertions.name: includes-get-transaction-verification
assertions.text: The response tells user to check deploy status with get-transaction
